levels.title: Select Specific Columns #1
levels.description: Only retrieve the 'name' and 'email' columns from the users table.

levels.title: Filter by Condition #2
levels.description: Fetch users who are older than 18.

levels.title: Sort by Date #3
levels.description: Order the posts by created_at in descending order.
levels.solution_code: SELECT * FROM posts ORDER BY created_at DESC;

levels.title: Count Records #4
levels.description: Get the total number of users in the table.

levels.title: Inner Join #5
levels.description: Join posts with users on the user_id field.
levels.solution_code: SELECT * FROM posts JOIN users ON posts.user_id = users.id;

levels.title: Unique Values #6
levels.description: Get unique country values from the addresses table.

levels.title: Update Record #7
levels.description: Change the status to 'active' for user with ID 5.
levels.solution_code: UPDATE users SET status = 'active' WHERE id = 5;

levels.title: Delete Record #8
levels.description: Remove the post with ID 10.

levels.title: Group by Category #9
levels.description: Count items in each category.
levels.solution_code: SELECT category, count(*) FROM products GROUP BY category;
